title: rubus × expansus
intro: Rubus × expansus, a hybrid of the raspberry and blackberry plants, is a type of bramble that combines the desirable traits of its parent species. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been utilized in various herbal preparations. The health benefits of Rubus × expansus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce swelling and pain, and even help manage blood sugar levels, making it a valuable addition to traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Rubus × expansus can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
